## ✅ GROVE-S03-T01 — Implemented

### What was built

**9 files modified + 1 new file created**, following the approved plan exactly:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `core/src/config.rs` | **NEW** — Integration `Mode` enum (Mcp/Skill/Both/McpLlm/Grammars, kebab-case wire), `GroveConfig` struct with atomic save/load/validate, 8 unit tests |
| `core/src/explore/config.rs` | `Mode` → `Steering`, field `mode` → `steering` on `ExploreConfig` + `RawExploreConfig`, updated tests + added `legacy_mode_key_rejected` |
| `core/src/explore/mod.rs` | Re-exports `Steering` instead of `Mode` |
| `core/src/explore/agent.rs` | `Mode` → `Steering` throughout, `cfg.mode` → `cfg.steering` |
| `core/src/explore/steering.rs` | `Mode` → `Steering`, `system_prompt` parameter renamed |
| `core/src/lib.rs` | `pub mod config;` added; `GroveConfig` + integration `Mode` re-exported; explore re-export updated to `Steering` |
| `cli/src/config_tui/model.rs` | `Mode` → `Steering` import; `cfg.steering` field; struct literal updated |
| `cli/src/config_tui/update.rs` | `Mode::Aggressive` → `Steering::Aggressive` |
| `cli/src/mcp.rs` | `cfg.mode` → `cfg.steering` |
| `cli/tests/cli.rs` | 6 fixture JSONs: `"mode"` → `"steering"` |
